summary: Copper and other base metals climbed as as traders awaited fresh peace talks between the US and Iran and clues on the outlook for US monetary policy.

title: Market Has ‘Resilience Factor,’ Says Oppenheimer’s Stoltzfus

title: US Stocks Set to Finish Best Quarter in Six Years: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国股市将迎来六年来最好的季度：市场总结
summary: US index futures rose modestly on the last day of a quarter that looks set to be the S&P 500’s best in six years. The dollar climbed as the yen slid to its weakest level since 1986.

title: BlackRock Downgrades Emerging-Market Equities Over AI Risks
title_cn: 贝莱德因人工智能风险下调新兴市场股票评级
summary: BlackRock Inc.’s research arm has become cautious on emerging-market stocks and is bullish about short- and medium-term euro-area government bonds, according to its 2026 mid-year global investment outlook.

title: Iran Ratchets Up Talk of Controlling Hormuz Before New Talks | The Opening Trade 6/30/2026
title_cn: 伊朗在新会谈之前加强控制霍尔木兹海峡的讨论开盘交易 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary:
Iran reiterated its determination to control maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, raising the stakes ahead of fresh talks in Qatar on formally ending its war with the US.

Speaking to state television, Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi said Iran wants to work out an agreement with Oman, which borders the southern side of the vital waterway, to oversee ships passing through Hormuz. But Iran will move forward with its own plans “if for any reason Oman is not interested in doing so,” he said.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meiji Yasuda Doubles Super-Long Japanese Bond Buying Plan
title_cn: 明治安田将超长期日本债券购买计划加倍
summary: Meiji Yasuda Life Insurance Co. aims to buy more than ¥2 trillion ($12 billion) of super-long Japanese government bonds in the fiscal year ending March 2027, doubling its earlier purchase plan on the view that yields have climbed to desirable levels.

title: Iran Demands Greater Control of Hormuz as Talks Resume
title_cn: 随着谈判恢复，伊朗要求加强对霍尔木兹的控制
summary: Iran reiterated its determination to oversee and control maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz ahead of a fresh round of talks in Qatar on formally ending its war with the US. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Headed for Largest Quarterly Price Drop Since 2020
title_cn: 石油价格将出现 2020 年以来最大季度跌幅
summary: Oil is set for the biggest quarterly decline since the pandemic and Morgan Stanley is warning of a potential glut ahead as flows through the Strait of Hormuz accelerated following progress on a peace deal between the US and Iran. Alaric Nightengale reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Traders on High Alert as the Yen Hits a Four-Decade Low
title_cn: 日元跌至四年来新低，交易员保持高度警惕
summary: The Japanese government has already tried once to stop the yen’s slide. Will it intervene again?

title: New Investors Fuel Record Share Sales by Listed Polish Firms
title_cn: 新投资者推动波兰上市公司创纪录的股票销售
summary: Poland’s companies are selling more shares on the secondary market than ever before in a trend driven by increasingly active local investors.

title: US Stocks Head for Best Quarter in Six Years | The Pulse 6/30/2026
title_cn: 美股迎来六年来最佳季度表现脉搏 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Torsten Slok, Apollo Global Management Chief Economist; Jim O'Neil, UK House of Lords Member & Former Goldman Sachs Asset Management Chairman; Tobias Adrian, IMF Financial Counsellor & Director of the Monetary and Capital Markets Department; Beata Javorcik, European Bank for Reconstruction and Development Chief Economist    (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yen’s Slide Puts Market on Lookout for Japan’s Next Red Line
title_cn: 日元下跌让市场关注日本的下一条红线
summary: The yen’s slide to its weakest against the dollar in four decades has left traders looking for Japan’s next line in the sand for the currency.

title: Mizuho, SMFG Fuel Record Japan Corporate Bond Sales Abroad
title_cn: 瑞穗银行、三井住友金融集团创下日本企业债券海外销售纪录
summary: Mizuho Financial Group Inc. and Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group Inc. have propelled foreign-currency bond sales by Japanese companies to a record for any quarter as the nation’s companies tap deeper overseas markets to finance growth.

title: ECB Officials Stay Alert as Lane Shifts Focus to Price Pipeline
title_cn: 莱恩将重点转向价格管道，欧洲央行官员保持警惕
summary: European Central Bank officials insisted the inflation shock caused by the Iran war can’t yet be judged to be over, even if hostilities have largely ceased.

title: Shell Sees 2026 LNG Trade Flat If Hormuz Reopens in Summer
title_cn: 如果霍尔木兹海峡在夏季重新开放，壳牌预计 2026 年液化天然气贸易将持平
summary: Shell Plc expects global liquefied natural gas flows to be little changed this year — after more than a decade of growth — if shipping through the Strait of Hormuz returns to normal this summer.

title: Miners Turn South African Stocks From Leaders to Laggards
title_cn: 矿商将南非股市从领先者变为落后者
summary: The precious-metals miners that propelled South African stocks to a record have become a millstone, dragging the benchmark index toward its worst quarterly slump in almost three years.

title: India Plans to Cut Reliance on Middle East Oil After War Shock
title_cn: 印度计划在战争冲击后减少对中东石油的依赖
summary: India’s state oil refiners are planning to reduce their reliance on the Middle East following the supply shock of the Iran war, and will lean more heavily on alternative options including through spot-market purchases, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: EU Cuts Tariff-Free Steel Quota 33% For Close Trade Partners
title_cn: 欧盟将密切贸易伙伴的免关税钢铁配额削减33%
summary: The European Union will reserve half of its steel quotas for countries with free-trade deals under new measures meant to protect local industry from mostly Chinese imports.

title: Singapore Households Face Record Power Bills on War’s Impact
title_cn: 由于战争的影响，新加坡家庭面临创纪录的电费
summary: Power bills for households in Singapore will hit a record high next quarter as the impact of the US-Iran war feeds through, highlighting the inflationary fallout from the conflict even as regional tensions ease.

title: Susquehanna Says It Lost Millions to Mystery Insider Traders
title_cn: 萨斯奎哈纳称其因神秘内幕交易者损失了数百万美元
summary: Susquehanna Investment Group is attempting to unmask the identities of individuals it claims made at least $100 million trading on inside information about a Chinese government crackdown on cross-border brokerages last month.

title: Congo Orders Cobalt Miners to Give Up Unused Export Quotas
title_cn: 刚果命令钴矿商放弃未使用的出口配额
summary: Cobalt miners in the Democratic Republic of Congo will be required to surrender unused export quotas for the first half of the year to a government regulator, potentially adding to tightness in the market for the battery metal.

title: HSBC Says ‘Explosive’ Dollar Rally Is Among Biggest Pain Trades
title_cn: 汇丰银行称美元“爆炸性”反弹是最大的痛苦交易之一
summary: A sharp rise in the dollar may emerge as one of the biggest “pain trades” in the second half of the year, according to HSBC Holdings Plc.

title: Oil Set for Quarterly Drop as Morgan Stanley Warns of Glut Risks
title_cn: 摩根士丹利警告过剩风险，油价将出现季度下跌
summary: Oil headed for the biggest quarterly decline since the pandemic as flows through the Strait of Hormuz accelerated following progress on a peace deal, with Morgan Stanley warning of a potential glut ahead.

title: French Inflation Unexpectedly Falls Back to ECB’s 2% Target
title_cn: 法国通胀意外回落至欧洲央行 2% 目标
summary: French inflation slowed for the first time since the Iran war broke out as energy costs fell, alleviating pressure on the European Central Bank to keep raising interest rates.

title: Slok Says ECB May Hike Interest Rates Again in September
title_cn: 斯洛克表示欧洲央行可能在九月再次加息
summary: Torsten Slok, chief economist of Apollo Global Management, tells Bloomberg Television the European Central Bank faces uncertainty over second-round effects following months of energy-cost increases. "I do think that they will probably still think about hiking rates in September, and I still think that there is a highest likelihood that they will hike in September." Slok speaks with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emirates NBD Said to Be in Talks to Buy HSBC’s Turkey Unit
title_cn: 据称，Emirates NBD 正在洽谈收购汇丰银行土耳其业务
summary: Emirates NBD PJSC is in talks to buy HSBC Holdings Plc’s Turkey operations, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Former Goldman Economist O'Neill on Burnham's UK Plan
title_cn: 前高盛经济学家奥尼尔谈伯纳姆的英国计划
summary: Former Goldman Sachs economist Jim O’Neill, who has advised UK leadership contender Andy Burnham on economic matters, discusses the Labour Party MP's plan to decentralize power in a bid to boost Britain's economy. O'Neill speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks’ Best Quarter Ever Is Ending With Some Wild Swings
title_cn: 芯片股有史以来最好的一个季度以剧烈波动结束
summary: Chip stocks are heading for their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. But after recent jitters sent the stocks tumbling, investors are wondering how much further the rally can go.

title: Global Central Banks Plan to Reduce Dollar Holdings, Survey Says
title_cn: 调查显示全球央行计划减少美元持有量
summary: For the first time in three years, global central banks plan to reduce their exposure to the US dollar in the long term, according to a UK-based think tank.

title: Yen Sinks to Lowest Level Since 1986
title_cn: 日元跌至 1986 年以来最低水平
summary:
The yen just hit its weakest level against the dollar in four decades. Japan has raised interest rates and spent billions defending its currency. Yet the yen keeps sliding. Mia Glass explains why.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Call Center Stocks Fall on Worry AI Is Makes Them ‘Uninvestible’
title_cn: 呼叫中心股票因担心人工智能使它们“不可投资”而下跌
summary: Signs that companies are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence to handle customer service tasks has triggered a fresh selloff in shares of two call-center companies.

title: Chinese AI Firms’ Newest Battleground: World Cup Predictions
title_cn: 中国AI企业的最新战场：世界杯预测
summary: The companies are using interest in the popular sporting event to promote their AI models

title: AI Notetakers in Meetings Raise Mounting Privacy Concerns
title_cn: 会议中的人工智能笔记员提出了越来越多的隐私问题
summary: Executives and companies are grappling with how to manage the tools’ often uninvited presence.

title: IMF: Cyberattacks Getting Faster
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织：网络攻击速度越来越快
summary:
The time between a software vulnerability being found and then exploited by a bad actor is shrinking says Tobias Adrian, Financial Counsellor and Director of the Monetary and Capital Markets Department at the International Monetary Fund. This poses a real threat to financial stability, says Adrian. He spoke to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua on the sidelines of the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra on 'The Pulse'. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lee’s $880 Billion AI Bet Ties Legacy to South Korea Chip Boom
title_cn: Lee 的 8800 亿美元 AI 赌注将遗产与韩国芯片热潮联系在一起
summary: With South Korea already one of the biggest winners of the global AI boom, President Lee Jae Myung is now staking his legacy on a plan to transform the nation’s less developed southwest into a global chip hub.

title: Weak Hiring Is Hurting Young Workers More than AI, Study Says
title_cn: 研究称，招聘疲软对年轻工人的伤害比人工智能更大
summary: A shortage of job openings in the US is playing a much bigger role in young people’s unemployment than their lack of artificial intelligence skills, according to a new study from the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis.

title: Equirus Is Said to Consider Fundraising at $600 Million Value
title_cn: 据称 Equirus 正在考虑筹集价值 6 亿美元的资金
summary: Equirus Capital Pvt is considering raising as much as $60 million in a funding round, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SAP Gives AI Product Oversight to Top Executives in Reshuffle
title_cn: SAP在洗牌中将人工智能产品交给高层管理人员监督
summary: SAP SE is divvying up responsibilities for its product and engineering functions in its second top-level reorganization this year, people familiar with the matter said, as Europe’s largest software company grapples with staying ahead of rising artificial intelligence competition.

title: The Original Prediction Market Boosters Have Qualms About the Boom
title_cn: 最初的预测市场推动者对繁荣抱有疑虑
summary: At Manifest, some tech intellectuals wondered whether Super Bowl bets were really helping humanity.

title: What the Saga Over Anthropic’s Mythos Tells Us About the Cyber Risks From AI
title_cn: 关于人类神话的传奇故事告诉我们关于人工智能的网络风险
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its Mythos artificial intelligence model is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. As of early June, the AI giant had released Mythos to only 200 partner organizations because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic said, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: Citi’s Chew Sees Selloff Risk in Tech Stocks From Positioning
title_cn: 花旗集团的 Chew 从仓位中看到科技股面临抛售风险
summary: US technology shares are at risk of further declines as overall investor exposure to the cohort is still elevated, according to Citigroup Inc. strategists.

title: M&G's Fedeli Says Its Worth Investing in 'AI Losers'
title_cn: M&G 的 Fedeli 表示值得投资“人工智能失败者”
summary: Fabiana Fedeli, CIO of multi-asset at M&G Investments, says that while there is still value in equities, markets such as South Korea have displayed "exuberant" behavior. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, she says: "there is a whole host of stocks which are the AI losers — the stocks that have been forgotten by the AI trade — that I still think I still think are very worthwhile investing in." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NeoPulse-Led Group to Acquire Stake in Korean Game Maker Wemade
title_cn: NeoPulse 领导的集团将收购韩国游戏制造商 Wemade 的股份
summary: A consortium led by NeoPulse is close to a deal to buy nearly 40% of South Korean firm Wemade Co. from founder and Chairman Park Kwan-ho, a spokesman for Wemade said in response to a Bloomberg News query.

title: SpaceX IPO Left Korea Broker With No Shares on Misunderstanding
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股导致韩国经纪人因误解而没有股票
summary: It was supposed to be the deal that vaulted Mirae Asset Securities Co. into the global big leagues.

title: Spain's War on Football Piracy Knocks Legitimate Sites Offline
title_cn: 西班牙打击足球盗版的战争导致合法网站下线
summary: From small businesses to government agencies, legitimate websites are getting caught in the crossfire of LaLiga's fight against illegal sports streams

title: AirPods Maker Luxshare Seeks Up to $3.1 Billion From Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: AirPods 制造商立讯精密寻求在香港上市筹集高达 31 亿美元的资金
summary: Tuesday got off to a busy start in Hong Kong, with a wave of companies including Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. taking orders for listings worth a combined $6 billion.

title: Taiwan Opposition’s $7.5 Billion Plan Stirs Drone Defense Debate
title_cn: 台湾反对派75亿美元计划引发无人机防御争论
summary: Taiwan’s main opposition party outlined plans to develop the drone industry just days after stalling a similar proposal from President Lai Ching-te’s government, amid a debate on unmanned systems with crucial implications for the island’s defense.

title: Taiwan Raids Super Micro in Widening China Chip Smuggling Probe
title_cn: 台湾打击超微扩大中国芯片走私调查
summary: Taiwan government agencies raided the offices of Super Micro Computer Inc. and several of its local affiliates, deepening an investigation into the alleged smuggling of Nvidia Corp. chips into China using the company’s servers.

title: Amazon to Pay $2.25 Million to End US Case Over ID Theft Victims
title_cn: 亚马逊将支付 225 万美元结束美国身份盗窃受害者案件
summary: Amazon.com Inc. agreed to pay $2.25 million to settle US claims that it routinely failed to provide records to help customers who were victims of identity theft.

title: StanChart Former AI Chief Joins Accenture as Southeast Asia Head
title_cn: 渣打银行前人工智能主管加入埃森哲担任东南亚区主管
summary: Standard Chartered Plc’s former global head of AI enablement, David Hardoon, has joined Accenture Plc as managing director and head of advanced AI for Southeast Asia.

title: South Korea to Speed Nuclear Push to Meet Surging Power Demand
title_cn: 韩国将加快核计划以满足不断增长的电力需求
summary: The South Korean government will consider ways to cut atomic power construction times as it looks to ramp up energy supply to meet the demands of artificial intelligence.

title: Tencent Ramps Up Buybacks as Share Rout Wipes Out $309 Billion
title_cn: 腾讯加大回购力度，股价暴跌损失 3090 亿美元
summary: China’s Tencent Holdings Ltd. is ramping up buybacks as its Hong Kong-listed shares struggle to recover from a selloff that’s wiped out about $309 billion in market value since early October.

title: House Passes Online Safety Bill as Senate Eyes Stricter Push
title_cn: 众议院通过在线安全法案，参议院加大力度推动
summary: The House on Monday passed legislation to require new online safety protections for children, a sign of growing momentum in Washington to address a widespread concern among US parents even as the measure sets up a clash with senators seeking stronger safeguards.

title: Amazon Sued by Australian Consumer Watchdog Over Prime Video Ads
title_cn: 亚马逊因 Prime 视频广告被澳大利亚消费者监管机构起诉
summary: Amazon.com Inc. has been sued by Australia’s consumer watchdog for introducing advertising to its Prime Video streaming service and then forcing existing subscribers to pay more to avoid the ads.

title: Exiled Chinese Tycoon Gets 30 Years in Prison for Billion-Dollar Fraud
title_cn: 流亡中国大亨因数十亿美元欺诈被判入狱 30 年
summary: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo, who promoted himself as a crusader against the communist government in Beijing, was ordered to spend 30 years in a US prison for duping investors out of $1 billion.

title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Sets Stage for More Media, Broadband Deals
title_cn: 康卡斯特分拆 NBC 为更多媒体、宽带交易奠定基础
summary: Brian Roberts lost out on an opportunity last year to merge NBCUniversal with Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. But the process helped get the chairman and co-chief executive officer of Comcast Corp. thinking about what NBCUniversal would look like on its own.

title: Grid Woes Push UK Clean Power Goal Back Five Years, Report Shows
title_cn: 报告显示，电网问题使英国清洁电力目标推迟五年
summary: The UK will probably miss its clean electricity target by five years because of capacity constraints on its grid and could struggle to deliver on promises to cut household energy bills, according to consultant LCP Delta.

title: Supreme Court Re-Shapes Power of Presidency | The Close 6/29/2026
title_cn: 最高法院重塑总统权力|收盘价 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are PIMCO Head of Short-Term Portfolio Management Jerome Schneider, Former FTC Chair & Commissioner William Kovacic, Seaport Research Partners Senior Analyst David Joyce, LSEG CEO David Schwimmer, JPMorgan Executive Director Global Market Strategist Meera Pandit, Former Fed Governor Betsy Duke, Goldman Sachs Economist Joseph Briggs, Honeywell Aerospace CEO Jim Currier, SW Retail Advisors President & Founder Stacey Widlitz, & VCR Group Founder & CEO David Rodolitz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: LSEG CEO on AI Market Impact, Share Buybacks, Volatility
title_cn: 伦敦证券交易所集团首席执行官谈人工智能市场影响、股票回购和波动性
summary: David Schwimmer, CEO of the London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG), discussed the transformative impact of artificial intelligence on the financial markets. He emphasized that despite a challenging 2025 for shares, AI presents a significant opportunity for LSEG by enhancing the value of its proprietary data, which constitutes over 90% of its dataset. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Trump Has Changed the American Dream for Many Immigrants
title_cn: 特朗普如何改变了许多移民的美国梦
summary: The president is pushing to redefine who is welcome — and who isn’t.

title: Superyacht Linked to Usmanov Ruled Not Under EU Sanctions
title_cn: 与乌斯马诺夫有关的超级游艇不受欧盟制裁
summary: A superyacht linked to Russian billionaire Alisher Usmanov’s family can no longer be considered frozen under the European Union’s sanctions regime, a Frankfurt court ruled, allowing the shipyard maintaining the vessel to seek payment for years of maintenance.

title: Monaco Bomb Blast Wounds Businessman Sanctioned by Ukraine
title_cn: 摩纳哥炸弹爆炸致商人被乌克兰制裁
summary: A bomb explosion on Monday night in Monaco wounded Vadym Iermolaiev, a local resident who was sanctioned by Ukraine for doing business in occupied Crimea, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Starmer Defense Plan Gives Successor Tools to Fight UK’s Threats
title_cn: 斯塔默防御计划为应对英国威胁提供了后续工具
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he was confident his likely successor, Andy Burnham, would maintain the UK’s commitment to defense, as he laid out plans to invest £15 billion ($20 billion) to modernize the British military.

title: Gojek Founder Makarim Found Guilty in Indonesia Chromebooks Case
title_cn: Gojek 创始人 Makarim 在印度尼西亚 Chromebook 案中被判有罪
summary: Former Indonesian Education Minister and Gojek co-founder Nadiem Makarim was found guilty of corruption over a pandemic-era procurement of Chromebooks for schools, a ruling likely to add to investor concerns about how Southeast Asia’s largest economy distinguishes graft from disputed policy and business decisions.

title: Tokyo and Seoul Bet the House on AI Buildouts
title_cn: 东京和首尔押注于人工智能建设
summary: South Korea, Japan unveil massive investment blueprints.

title: Putin’s Closest Ally Tested as Minsk Resists Deeper War Role
title_cn: 明斯克抵制更深层次的战争角色，普京最亲密的盟友面临考验
summary: Russia’s close alliance with Belarus is facing a new test as President Alexander Lukashenko has shown reluctance to deepen his role in Vladimir Putin’s war against Ukraine.

title: Russian Threat Likely to Endure After Putin, Sweden Says
title_cn: 瑞典称，普京之后俄罗斯的威胁可能会持续下去
summary: The Russian regime is likely to remain a threat to its neighbors well after President Vladimir Putin’s time in office ends, the head of Sweden’s military intelligence agency said.

title: Orban’s Ex-Bodyguard Questioned on Ukraine Money Convoy Grab
title_cn: 欧尔班前保镖因乌克兰抢钱案接受质询
summary: Hungarian prosecutors questioned a former top police officer and long-time associate of ex-Prime Minister Viktor Orban on suspicion of having been involved in seizing a Ukraine-bound money transport and unlawfully detaining the officials accompanying it.

title: Lebanon-Israel Pact Fragile After Hezbollah’s Vow of Disruption
title_cn: 真主党誓言破坏后，黎巴嫩-以色列条约变得脆弱
summary: Israel and Lebanon’s latest peace deal faces an uncertain future after Hezbollah, Iran’s most powerful proxy militant group, this week vowed to derail its implementation.

title: Anti-Migrant Demonstrations Draw Thousands Across South Africa
title_cn: 南非各地举行反移民示威活动
summary: Thousands of people joined anti-migrant protests in South Africa on Tuesday, watched over by a massive police contingent that was deployed to prevent violence and intimidation.

title: Burnham’s Devolution Plan Lacks Detail on Financial Matters
title_cn: 伯纳姆的权力下放计划缺乏财务问题的细节
summary: Andy Burnham’s economic plan for Britain starts from the bottom up.

title: German, Dutch Militaries Take Command on NATO’s Eastern Flank
title_cn: 德国、荷兰军队在北约东翼指挥
summary: Germany and the Netherlands established a military command center in the Baltic region to deter Russia as part of a broader effort to take on responsibility within NATO ahead of a summit of the alliance next week.

title: UK Bets on Drones and AI in Contentious Defense Funding Plan
title_cn: 英国在有争议的国防资助计划中押注无人机和人工智能
summary: The UK will seek to transform its aging military into a force fit for modern warfare by investing in drones and artificial intelligence alongside more traditional deterrents such as fighter jets and nuclear weapons.

title: UK to Update Military Capabilities Using Drones, AI
title_cn: 英国将利用无人机和人工智能更新军事能力
summary: The UK is updating its military by investing in new technology like drones and artificial intelligence, while still keeping traditional deterrents like fighter jets and nuclear weapons. Prime Minister Keir Starmer will lay out the plans on Tuesday after months of delay and a funding row. Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Ratchets Up Talk of Controlling Hormuz Before New Talks
title_cn: 伊朗在新会谈之前加强控制霍尔木兹海峡的讨论
summary: Iran reiterated its determination to control maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, raising the stakes ahead of fresh talks in Qatar on formally ending its war with the US.

title: Iran Says it Will Control Hormuz & Has No Plans to Meet US in Qatar | Daybreak Europe 6/30/2026
title_cn: 伊朗表示将控制霍尔木兹且没有计划在卡塔尔与美国会面欧洲黎明 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, stocks in Asia headed for their biggest quarterly jump since 2009, as investors piled back into companies seen as beneficiaries of the AI buildout. Elsewhere, the yen extended its recent losses to weaken beyond 162 per dollar.

A top Iranian official says Iran is determined to maintain control over maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, raising the stakes ahead of talks, which the US says will take place in Doha on Tuesday. 

And the ECB President Christine Lagarde has lauded Europe's resilience to economic shocks in her opening speech at the ECB's annual forum in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU, China Set October Deadline to Defuse Rising Trade Tensions
title_cn: 欧盟和中国设定十月最后期限以化解日益加剧的贸易紧张局势
summary: The European Union and China have set an October deadline to resolve ongoing trade disputes. Following a meeting with Chinese Commerce Minister Wang Wentao in Brussels, EU trade chief Maros Sefcovic stated that while not all issues will be fixed, both sides have enough time to achieve "tangible results." Bloomberg's Richard Bravo reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa's Police on High Alert for Anti-Migrant Protests
title_cn: 南非警方对反移民抗议活动保持高度戒备
summary: South African police warned they would tolerate no intimidation or violence as they prepare for Tuesday's nationwide anti-migrant demonstrations. The demonstrations are the culmination of weeks of protests that have displaced thousands of mainly African expatriates. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Buffett Delays Gifts to Gates’ Charity Amid Epstein Review: WSJ
title_cn: 华尔街日报：在爱泼斯坦的批评中，巴菲特推迟了向盖茨慈善机构捐赠的礼物
summary: Warren Buffett has decided to skip his midyear donations to the Gates Foundation for the first time in two decades, as he waits for the results of a review into the organization’s links to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, the Wall Street Journal reported late Monday.

title: EU and China Agree on October Deadline to Reset Trade Ties
title_cn: 欧盟和中国就重启贸易关系的十月最后期限达成一致
summary: The European Union and China set an October deadline to make progress on trade disagreements, as tensions rise between the two economic powers.

title: China Escalates Takaichi Feud, Blacklists More Japan Firms
title_cn: 中国升级高市不和，将更多日本公司列入黑名单
summary: China expanded its export-control offensive against Japan, doubling the number of Japanese entities subject to curbs and deepening a feud with Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s government.

title: EY Staffers Accused of Accessing Australia PM’s Bank Account
title_cn: 安永员工被指控访问澳大利亚总理的银行账户
summary: Two junior hires at consulting firm EY allegedly accessed the bank account of Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese, people familiar with the matter said, a potential criminal development that adds to a series of governance scandals engulfing the sector in recent years.

title: Trump Pauses Duties on Moroccan Fertilizer to Aid Farm Economy
title_cn: 特朗普暂停对摩洛哥化肥征收关税以援助农业经济
summary: President Donald Trump will temporarily lift duties on phosphate fertilizer from Morocco as the administration seeks to aid a struggling farm economy and appease consumer fears over food inflation.

title: Trump Calls Bipartisan Housing Bill 'A Big Yawn' | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/29/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称两党住房法案“大打哈欠”权力平衡：最新版 06/29/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Natasha Sarin, Professor and Co-Founder of the Budget Lab at Yale University, and Jessica Roth, Professor at Cardozo Law School and a former federal prosecutor for the Southern District of New York, discuss the Supreme Court's rulings on President Trump's ability to fire agency heads and whether Lisa Cook can remain in her job at the Federal Reserve. Steven Cook, Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations, says the US and Iran remain far apart on key issues - particularly, the Strait of Hormuz and Tehran’s nuclear program. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Convert Marc Andreessen Gets Spot on Pentagon Policy Board
title_cn: 马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen) 加入五角大楼政策委员会
summary: Billionaire venture capitalist Marc Andreessen, the one-time Democratic supporter who switched his allegiance to Donald Trump, got a spot with several other prominent Republican politicians and former officials on a top Pentagon advisory board.

title: Cook: Iran Talks May Go in Circles
title_cn: 库克：伊朗谈判可能陷入困境
summary: Steven Cook, Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations, says the US and Iran remain far apart on key issues - particularly, the Strait of Hormuz and Tehran’s nuclear program. Cook also discusses the Trump administration’s approach to regional diplomacy, and why he is skeptical a Israel-Lebanon agreement will be implemented. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
